overview.description: AI and digital transformation consulting for enterprises and public sector
overview.description_long: SLÍVKA Architects s.r.o. provides professional technology services focused on helping organisations with digital transformation. Working with government institutions and leading commercial enterprises, they deliver end-to-end services from technology analysis and AI strategy through solution architecture and technical supervision to implementation and adoption. Their offerings span AI consulting, custom AI development, data engineering, generative AI, and workforce training.
overview.tagline: Your Partner in Digital Transformation Success

history.origin_story: Founded by four partners with expertise in technology architecture and digital transformation consulting, serving both commercial and government clients in the Czech Republic.

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: As a consulting firm primarily offering AI strategy, advisory, and implementation services, SLÍVKA Architects has limited proprietary technology moat. Core deliverables (strategy documents, architecture designs, use-case identification) are increasingly replicable by AI-assisted platforms and commoditising consulting tools, leaving the firm reliant on relationship capital and domain trust.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Digital transformation and AI adoption consulting is a real and growing market, but it is highly competitive with large global SIs (Accenture, Deloitte) and specialist boutiques. As a small four-partner firm, winning large enterprise or government contracts requires significant differentiation.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known external funding; appears fully bootstrapped with a very small founding team. No revenue signals are publicly available, and the careers page shows zero open roles, suggesting limited scale. Cash flow depends entirely on client engagements.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: The combination of a thin technology moat, intense consulting competition, and no visible external funding places this firm in a high-risk category. Survival depends on building strong client relationships and expanding proprietary offerings before larger players or AI-native tools commoditise their advisory services.

metadata.notes: Small Czech AI consulting boutique, four partners. No open roles as of scrape date. Website uses Odoo CMS. Two addresses found: Karolinská 654/2 (CNAIP) and Ke Klíčovu 191/9 (website footer).
